string.name: preferences_calendar_delete_message
string.value: Do you really want to delete this calendar?

string.name: wifi_not_connected
string.value: Wi\u2011Fi is not connected to the internet

string.name: fa_down_left_and_up_right_to_center_label
string.value: Down left and up right to center

string.name: fa_square_font_awesome_stroke_label
string.value: Font Awesome in Square with Stroke Outline

string.name: fa_up_right_and_down_left_from_center_label
string.value: Up right and down left from center

string.name: help_contextual_actions_help
string.value: The menu for contextual actions gets displayed by long tapping on a list entry.

string.name: help_MyExpenses_info
string.value: This screen lists all transactions for the current account. Use the floating action button to open the form for creating a new transaction.

string.name: help_MyExpenses_fab_long_press
string.value: Long press on the floating action button opens a menu that allows to prepare the form for transfer, split transaction or income.

string.name: popup_MyExpenses_toolbar_intro
string.value: Tapping on the toolbar (account label or current balance) pops up a menu with the following entries:

string.name: popup_MyExpenses_toolbar_copy_text
string.value: Copy the current balance to the clipboard.

string.name: popup_MyExpenses_toolbar_new_balance
string.value: Calculate the difference between the current balance and a new value.

string.name: menu_status_handle_help_text
string.value: The status of the transaction is indicated by a colored rectangle: gray for unreconciled, blue for clear, green for reconciled. Clicking on the rectangle, changes the status.

string.name: menu_reset_help_text
string.value: This command will export all transactions of the current account to a file on the SD card in QIF or CSV format. You can decide to delete the exported transactions, in that case the opening balance is automatically adjusted. Alternatively, if transactions are not deleted, they will be marked as exported. My Expenses can share the file immediately after the export through FTP, email or any other file sharing app, if you configure it to do so in the Settings. If a search filter is active, only the transactions mapped by this filter will be taken into consideration.

string.name: menu_grouping_help_text
string.value: You can group transactions by day, week, month or year. For each group, the sum of income, expenses and transfers is calculated and displayed. When you click on a group header, the group of transactions is collapsed and only the header is displayed. Click again to expand.

string.name: menu_sort_direction_help_text
string.value: Transactions can be sorted in ascending (oldest on top) or descending (latest on top) direction.

string.name: menu_distribution_help_text
string.value: Display the distribution of your expenses per category. You can also long click on a group header to inspect the distribution for a specific period of time.

string.name: menu_budget_help_text
string.value: Manage daily, weekly, monthly or yearly budgets for the currently displayed account.

string.name: menu_history_help_text
string.value: Display a cash flow diagram: How have your expenses and income evolved throughout the last days, weeks, months or years?

string.name: menu_manage_plans_help_text
string.value: Opens the list of templates and plans, where you can apply, edit or delete them, and also define plans for future and recurrent transactions.

string.name: menu_balance_help_text
string.value: This command opens a dialog displaying the last reconciled balance and the cleared balance. You can compare the latter to your bank statement, and mark all cleared transactions as reconciled. Optionally you can decide to delete reconciled transactions.

string.name: menu_print_help_text
string.value: Generates a printable view of the transactions currently displayed.

string.name: menu_search_help_text
string.value: This entry opens a submenu which allows you to define search criteria based on category, amount, comment, status, payer/payee and payment method. When a search filter is active, you can simply click on its entry in the submenu to deactivate it.

string.name: cab_create_template_from_transaction_help_text
string.value: Define a new template based on the selected transaction. Will prompt you for the title of the template.

string.name: cab_clone_transaction_help_text
string.value: The selected transactions will be cloned with the current date and time. You can make changes before saving the copy.

string.name: cab_split_help_text
string.value: You can later edit the transaction to create additional parts as needed.

string.name: menu_scan_mode_help_text
string.value: Activate scan mode in order to quickly scan receipts.

string.name: cab_link_help_text
string.value: An expense in one account can be linked with an income in another account. If the accounts have the same currency, the two transactions must have identical amounts.

string.name: help_ManageMethods_info
string.value: This screen lists the predefined payment methods (Cheque, Credit card, Deposit, Direct debit) and lets you define new ones. Use the floating action button to open the form for creating a new method.

string.name: help_ManageParties_manage_info
string.value: This screen lists the parties used for the autocompletion of the Payer/Payee field.

string.name: help_ManageParties_select_mapping_info
string.value: Select a party by tapping on it.

string.name: help_ManageParties_select_filter_info
string.value: Select all the parties that you want to use for filtering the transaction list.

string.name: help_ManageParties_floating_action_button
string.value: Use the floating action button to add a new entry.

string.name: help_fab_confirm_selection
string.value: Use the floating action button to confirm the selection.

string.name: help_ManageParties_mergeMode_info_1
string.value: Select the duplicate parties that you want to merge.

string.name: help_ManageParties_mergeMode_info_2
string.value: You will be prompted to select which variant to keep.

string.name: menu_merge_help_text
string.value: If the same party appears multiple times in the list with different spelling variations, you can merge them together.

string.name: help_ManageTemplates_templates_info
string.value:
While templates can be derived from transactions through their context menu, here you can create new templates from scratch (for transactions or transfers) by clicking on the floating action button. Clicking on a template, will create an instance for it.
A plan is a template for which you have created an event (one-time or recurring) in the planner calendar. Clicking on a plan, will open a calendar view, which displays past and upcoming instances of a plan.

string.name: help_ManageTemplates_planner_intro
string.value: Long tapping on an open instance starts multi-selection. Tapping on the start or end of the date range allows to extend the range into the past or the future.

string.name: help_ManageTemplates_plans_intro
string.value: Each highlighted date represents an instance of the plan.

string.name: help_ManageTemplates_plans_info_header
string.value: The state of an instance is indicated by the following icons:

string.name: help_ManageTemplates_plans_info_open
string.value: The instance has not yet been applied.

string.name: help_ManageTemplates_plans_info_cancelled
string.value: The instance has been cancelled, i.e. you have flagged it to be skipped. No transaction will be created for this instance.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_templates_create_instance_save_help_text
string.value: Instantiate the selected templates and save them immediately.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_templates_create_instance_edit_help_text
string.value: Instantiate the selected template and enter its editing form where you can modify it before saving.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_delete_help_text
string.value: Delete the selected templates and any associated plans.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_edit_help_text
string.value: Edit the selected template and create or edit an associated plan.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_plans_create_instance_save_help_text
string.value: Create transactions at the time of the selected event instances and save them immediately.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_plans_create_instance_edit_help_text
string.value: Create a transaction at the time of the selected event instance and enter its editing form where you can modify it before saving.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_plans_cancel_plan_instance_help_text
string.value: Indicate that at the selected event instances, no transactions should be created. If transactions have been created for the selected event instances, they will be deleted.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_plans_reset_plan_instance_help_text
string.value: If transactions have been created for the selected event instances, they will be deleted, if they have been flagged as cancelled, the flags are removed.

string.name: cab_ManageTemplates_plans_edit_plan_instance_help_text
string.value: Edit the transaction that has been created for the selected plan instance.

string.name: menu_ManageTemplates_templates_sort_help_text
string.value: The template list can be sorted by title (alphabetically), by amount, by frequency of usages, or by the last time a transaction was instantiated from it.

string.name: help_ManageCategories_distribution_info
string.value: This screen displays the distribution of your expenses and incomes per categories, for all transactions in an account, or for a specific group. If you expand a main category in the list, the pie chart will display the distribution of its subcategories. If you select a category in the list, it will be highlighted in the pie chart, and vice-versa. Long press on a category in order to display an aggregated list of the transactions mapped to it.

string.name: help_ManageCategories_select_mapping_info
string.value: In addition to the actions that you can perform when managing categories from the Preferences screen (create, edit, delete), on this screen you map a transaction to a selected category by simply clicking on it.

string.name: help_ManageCategories_select_filter_info
string.value: Click on an entry for starting multi-selection.

string.name: help_ManageCategories_manage_info
string.value: This screen allows to create, edit and delete categories. By default, the primary sort criteria in the category list is the number of times you use a category (the secondary criteria is alphabetical order). This gives you quick access to the categories you use most often.

string.name: help_ManageCategories_expand_collapse
string.value: Click on the / icon to expand or collapse a category.

string.name: help_ManageCategories_manage_context
string.value: Click on an entry for showing its context menu. Long tap for starting multi-selection.

string.name: menu_ManageCategories_distribution_grouping_help_text
string.value: Set the type of grouping and display the distribution per day, month, week or year.

string.name: menu_back_help_text
string.value: Navigate to the previous group. Can also be done through swipe gesture from left to right.

string.name: menu_forward_help_text
string.value: Navigate to the next group. Can also be done through swipe gesture from right to left.

string.name: cab_ManageCategories_create_sub_cat_help_text
string.value: Opens the dialog for creating a new sub-category below the selected category. Sub-categories can be nested with arbitrary depth.

string.name: cab_ManageCategories_move_help_text
string.value: Any category (together with its sub-categories) can be moved to a new parent category. Sub-categories can be transformed to main categories.

string.name: cab_ManageCategories_merge_help_text
string.value: Categories of the same type can be merged.

string.name: menu_categories_setup_default_help_text
string.value: A set of default categories will be imported.

string.name: menu_categories_export_help_text
string.value: Categories will be exported to a QIF file.

string.name: menu_chart_help_text
string.value: Toggle the visibility of the chart.

string.name: cab_ManageCategories_select_filter_select_help_text
string.value: The selected categories will be used for filtering the transaction list.

string.name: menu_ManageCategories_search_help_text
string.value: Only main and sub categories which match your query will be displayed.

string.name: menu_ManageCategories_sort_help_text
string.value: The category list can be sorted by title (alphabetically), by frequency of usages, or by the last time a transaction was mapped to it.

string.name: cab_ManageCategories_color_help_text
string.value: You can assign a color to main categories. This color will be used to represent the category in charts. Subcategories will use shades of their main category's color.

string.name: help_ExpenseEdit_transaction_info
string.value: Use this form to enter a new transaction or to edit an existing one. Use the dropdown menu in the actionbar to switch to the form for adding a new transfer or split transaction.

string.name: help_ExpenseEdit_templateCategory_info
string.value: Use this form to enter a new template or to edit an existing one. Use the dropdown menu in the actionbar to switch between templates for transactions, transfers and splits.

string.name: help_ExpenseEdit_split_info
string.value: A split transaction is a single transaction split up in parts, where each part can be assigned to a different category, or transferred to a different account.

string.name: form_account_help_text
string.value: Select the account to which the transaction belongs.

string.name: form_date_time_help_text
string.value: Enter the date and time when the transaction took place.

string.name: form_date_time_help_text_configuration
string.value: In the settings you can disable time input and enable differentiation between booking date and value date.

string.name: form_date_time_help_text_link
string.value: If the / toggle is in its linked state, setting either value date or booking date will also update the other date.

string.name: form_amount_switch_help_text
string.value: Use the switch to toggle between expense and income.

string.name: form_calculator_help_text
string.value: The button opens the calculator.

string.name: form_crstatus_help_text
string.value: For transactions belonging to bank accounts, you can change the transaction's status to cleared. For setting it to reconciled, you must use the "Balance account" command from the transaction list. If the status is set to void, the transaction will not be counted.

string.name: form_comment_help_text
string.value: Enter any note about the object.

string.name: form_method_help_text
string.value: This field is only available if the current account is of a type linked to any payment method. By default only bank accounts are linked to payment methods (cheque,credit card, deposit,direct debit). Go to Settings -> Manage -> Payment Methods to configure the association between account types and payment methods. When you select a method that is defined as numbered, an additional field for entering a reference number becomes available.

string.name: form_attach_image_help_text
string.value: The button allows you to attach an image (e.g. from the gallery or the camera) to the object.

string.name: form_default_action_help_text
string.value: For each template, you can configure if a short tap on it in the template list will either save the instance immediately or enter its editing form where you can modify it before saving. You can always access both actions through a long tap.

string.name: form_category_help_text
string.value: This button opens the list of categories, where you can select the category you want to map to the transaction.

string.name: form_split_parts_heading_help_text_1
string.value: Use the + icon for entering as many split parts as needed.

string.name: form_split_parts_heading_help_text_2
string.value: The amount field will be automatically updated with the sum of the parts, unless you manually enter an amount, in which case the difference between the sum of the parts and the amount (unsplit amount) will be shown.

string.name: form_split_parts_heading_help_text_3
string.value: You can only save the split transaction, if the transaction amount has been exactly assigned.

string.name: form_ExpenseEdit_splitPartCategory_category_help_text
string.value: Select a category for this split part.

string.name: form_transfer_from_account_transfer_to_account_help_text
string.value: Assign the accounts where this object is transferred from or to.

string.name: form_exchange_rate_help_text
string.value: You can specify the rate in either of the both directions of the transfer. The inverse rate and the amount corresponding to the dependent part of the exchange rate are calculated automatically.

string.name: form_title_help_text
string.value: Enter a title that uniquely identifies the template.

string.name: form_plan_help_text
string.value: When you create a plan for a template, it is added to a private calendar handled by your Calendar app. You can define the plan as a one-time event, or as recurring daily, weekly, monthly or yearly.

string.name: form_plan_help_text_advanced
string.value: After you have saved the template, you can configure more advanced types of recurrence making use of your calendar app.

string.name: form_plan_help_text_mode
string.value: A plan can be set to automatic or manual. When an instance of an automatic plan occurs, the transaction will be created, and you receive a notification. When the plan is manual, you also receive a notification, which leaves the choice of canceling, modifying or applying the template to you.

string.name: menu_save_help_text
string.value: Save the data and close the form.

string.name: menu_save_and_new_help_text
string.value: If this is checked, after you save the data, the form is left open for creating a new transaction with the same data.

string.name: menu_original_amount_help_text
string.value: Show a field that allows to define an additional amount. For example if you pay with your credit card in a foreign currency, you can remember the original price in addition to the amount debited from your card. The original amount is ignored for calculating sums.

string.name: menu_equivalent_amount_help_text
string.value: For calculating a grand total across all accounts, transactions of foreign currency accounts, are multiplied by an exchange rate that you set for the account.

string.name: menu_invert_transfer_help_text
string.value: Invert the direction of the transfer by swapping 'From' and 'To' account.

string.name: form_ExpenseEdit_templateTransfer_foreign_currency_help_text
string.value: If the currencies of 'From' and 'To' account are different, you specify the amount for only one of them. The other one will be calculated when you create instances from the template.

string.name: form_goal_or_limit_help_text
string.value: This field allows to specify either a positive saving goal or a negative credit limit. In either case, on the account list, a progress indicator visualizes the distance between the current balance and the goal or the limit.

string.name: menu_templates_help_text
string.value: Open a menu that lists all templates allowing to quickly load them into the form.

string.name: menu_create_template_from_transaction_help_text
string.value: If this is checked, the transaction will also be saved as template. You can define its title and optionally set a plan for automatic recurrence.

string.name: form_AccountEdit_label_help_text
string.value: The label identifies the account in the account list.

string.name: form_description_help_text
string.value: The description has only an informative purpose.

string.name: form_AccountEdit_amount_switch_help_text
string.value: Use the switch to start with a negative opening balance.

string.name: form_currency_help_text
string.value: Select a currency from the provided list of all current currencies.

string.name: form_AccountEdit_type_help_text
string.value: You can define the type of an account as one of Cash, Bank, Asset, Liabilities, Credit Card. The type determines the available payment methods that you can configure under Settings -> Manage -> Payment Methods.

string.name: form_AccountEdit_type_help_text_reconciliation
string.value: The reconciliation feature is available for all but cash accounts: It allows to set a transactions' status to cleared, once it is confirmed, and reconcile the whole account with your bank statement through the "Balance account" command.

string.name: form_color_help_text
string.value: On the transaction list for an account, its color will be used as primary user interface color.

string.name: form_synchronization_help_text_select
string.value: Select a backend for cloud synchronization.

string.name: form_synchronization_help_text_add
string.value: Backends can be added from the Settings screen.

string.name: form_AccountEdit_active_tags_help_text
string.value: You can associate one ore more active tags with every account. When you create a new transaction, it is automatically tagged with those, based on the selected account.

string.name: menu_exclude_from_totals_help_text
string.value: If you check this option, this account will not be included into the aggregates per currency.

string.name: form_MethodEdit_label_help_text
string.value: The label identifies the method when you map a transaction to it.

string.name: form_MethodEdit_type_help_text
string.value: Through a method's type, you determine if it is applicable for expenses (debit), income (credit) or both (neutral).

string.name: form_MethodEdit_numbered_help_text
string.value: When a method is numbered, transactions that are mapped to it, will have an additional field for entering a reference number.

string.name: form_MethodEdit_account_types_help_text
string.value: Select the account types for which this method is applicable.

string.name: help_ManageCurrencies_info
string.value: For each currency, you can modify the number of fraction digits used. For example, if for Euro, you need to handle 1/10 of a ¢, i.e. 1/1000 of a Euro, you would set the number to three. Existing accounts which use the currency, will be switched to the new setting.

string.name: help_ManageCurrencies_symbol
string.value: You can also configure the currency symbol, which is used when amounts in a specific currency are formatted.

string.name: help_ManageCurrencies_new
string.value: For custom currencies, you additionally define a label, which is shown in menus for selecting a currency, and an alphabetic code, which by convention consists of three characters.

string.name: help_ManageStaleImages_info
string.value: This screen allows you to deal with image files that have been left over from deleted transactions. Long click on entries in order to either delete them, or move them out of the (possibly internal) storage folder to a backup folder (%s) on external storage.

string.name: help_CsvImportActivity_info
string.value:
After you select the file you want to import, you need to configure how the file is encoded (UTF-8 or ISO-8859-1), which character separates fields (comma, semicolon or tab), and how dates are formated. Data can be either imported into an existing account, or a new one, where you can configure the currency and the account type.

After you hit the Parse button from the action bar, the data will be presented you in a table. Before triggering the import through the button in the action bar, you can select rows that you want to discard, and you have to map the columns to the respective data fields.

When you discard the first row, you are prompted if you want it to be treated as a header line, in which case My Expenses will try to automatically map the columns based on the content of the header cells. It will also remember your mapping based on the header line, and restore it, when you import a file with the same header format the next time.

string.name: help_ExportDialog_date_format
string.value: Text can be quoted using single quotes (') to avoid interpretation. '' (two single quotes) represent a single quote. Consult the full specification for more details, or contact support@myexpenses.mobi for help.

string.name: help_NavigationDrawer_info
string.value: The account list allows you to easily navigate between accounts by simply clicking on an entry.

string.name: menu_create_account_help_text
string.value: Create a new account. The free version is limited to five accounts.

string.name: cab_NavigationDrawer_close_reopen_help_text
string.value: By closing an account, you can prevent any changes (additions, deletions, edits) to its data, but still allow it to be taken into consideration for all statistical calculations.

string.name: help_ManageSyncBackends_intro
string.value: My Expenses allows to configure different synchronization backends for each account. For example, you can sync one account with a shared folder, while you sync another account with a private folder. On this screen you add or remove synchronization backends, start or stop synchronization with accounts available remotely. While synchronization happens automatically in a periodic manner, here you can also manually trigger it with a backend. Please be aware that My Expenses needs full control over the remote folder. You should not use other tools or interfaces for changing its contents, since this will most likely lead to failures during synchronization.

string.name: help_ManageSyncBackends_webdav
string.value: If your cloud storage provider supports this protocol, My Expenses will be able to sync data with it. Simply provide the URL to a folder with your username and password. If you use https and your webserver uses a self-signed certificate, you will be able to trust it explicitly.

string.name: help_ManageSyncBackends_drive
string.value: Pick any folder that you own or that is shared with you.

string.name: help_ManageSyncBackends_encryption
string.value: For every backend, you can set a different passphrase for encrypting the synchronization data. You cannot switch an existing backend from unencrypted to encrypted. You need to recreate a new backend in that case. If you use the feature of storing auto-backups on the synchronization backend, these files are not encrypted with the backend specific password. Instead you can set a password that applies to all backup files, in the Security section of the Settings Screen.

string.name: help_ManageSyncBackends_saf
string.value: This option allows to select a folder via Android's File Picker Dialogue. It is mainly useful if you have installed a cloud storage app that supports selecting a folder for storing content, like NextCloud does.

string.name: menu_create_sync_backend_help_text
string.value: From the submenu select the type of synchronization backend that you want to add, and provide the details specific to each.

string.name: cab_sync_now_help_text
string.value: Trigger immediate synchronization with the selected backend.

string.name: cab_sync_download_help_text
string.value: Download an account that is available on the backend. An account will be created locally and be configured for synchronization with the backend.

string.name: cab_sync_link_help_text
string.value: Start synchronization for an account that exists both locally and remotely. You need to decide if local or remote data should be kept on the first synchronization.

string.name: cab_sync_unlink_help_text
string.value: The selected account will no longer be synced to the backend

string.name: help_HistoryActivity_info
string.value: This screen displays your cash flow, how your expenses and income evolve over years, months, weeks or days.

string.name: menu_HistoryActivity_grouping_help_text
string.value: Switch between daily, weekly, monthly or annual grouping of your cash flow data.

string.name: menu_HistoryActivity_history_show_balance_help_text
string.value: Toggle the visibility of the balance.

string.name: menu_HistoryActivity_history_transfers_help_text
string.value: Toggle, if transfers should be treated like a regular income or expense.

string.name: help_BudgetActivity_info
string.value: By defining a budget, you define an overall amount that you want to spend during a given period. You can also allocate amounts for categories and sub-categories. You then monitor how much you have spent and how much remains to be spent.

string.name: help_Budget_amount_click
string.value: Clicking on the budgeted amounts allows to change them.

string.name: help_Budget_amount_click_1
string.value: Changing an amount will never affect past periods. Unless you decide to only set it for the current period, it will affect future periods.

string.name: help_Budget_spent_click
string.value: Clicking on the spent amounts lists all the transactions relevant for the current budget and the corresponding category.

string.name: cab_show_transactions_help_text
string.value: Open a dialog listing all transactions mapped to the selected category in the current account.

string.name: menu_BudgetActivity_back_forward_help_text
string.value: Compare budget with spending of past and future periods of time.

string.name: menu_budget_allocated_only_help_text
string.value: By activating this option, only categories, for which some amount has been allocated, are displayed.

string.name: menu_BudgetActivity_delete_help_text
string.value: The currently displayed budget will be deleted.

string.name: menu_BudgetActivity_rollover_help_text
string.value: If you underspend or overspend on your budget, you can rollover the difference to the next period, so that the amount that you can allocate there is either increased or decreased. There are three options:

string.name: menu_BudgetActivity_rollover_total
string.value: Only the remainder for the total budget is rolled over, so that only the total budget of the next period is increased or decreased.

string.name: menu_BudgetActivity_rollover_categories
string.value: The remainder for each category is rolled over, and the corresponding allocation in the next period will be affected.

string.name: menu_BudgetActivity_rollover_edit
string.value: This option allows you to precisely configure the rollover. For example, you can set partial rollovers only for some categories or sub-categories, and rollover the remaining part on the total budget.

string.name: help_ManageBudgets_info
string.value: This screen shows a summary of all budgets you have created. Use the floating action button to create a new budget. Clicking on a list entry displays a single budget.

string.name: help_BudgetEdit_info
string.value: Use this form to create a new budget or to edit an existing one.

string.name: form_BudgetEdit_title_help_text
string.value: A budget's title helps identifying it in the budget list.

string.name: form_BudgetEdit_amount_help_text
string.value: How much money is available in the context of this budget.

string.name: form_BudgetEdit_accounts_help_text
string.value: A budget is either limited to one account; it covers all accounts with the same currency; or it refers to the total aggregate across all currencies.

string.name: form_BudgetEdit_filter_help_text
string.value: Budgets can be filtered with respect to categories, parties, methods or states. Only transactions matched by these filters are taken into account.

string.name: form_BudgetEdit_type_help_text
string.value: A budget is defined as either regular (daily, monthly, weekly, annual) or one-time. For one-time budgets, you specify the beginning and the end of its duration. A regular budget (that is not filtered) can be set as default: This means that the transaction list (if it is configured to group data per day, week, month or year) will show the progress for this budget for each period.

string.name: cab_remap_help_text
string.value: Use the commands in this submenu, if you want to change the given property (account, category, payer/payee or payment method) for all selected transactions.

string.name: form_tags_help_text
string.value: The + icon allows to select existing tags and to create new tags. The x icon on each tag allows to remove the mapping between the transaction and the tag.

string.name: help_ManageTags_select_filter_info
string.value: Select or unselect the tags for filtering the transaction list by tapping on them.

string.name: help_ManageTags_manage_info
string.value: Create new tags by entering them into the text field.

string.name: help_ManageTags_select_mapping_info
string.value: Map or unmap the tags by tapping on them. Use the floating action button to confirm the mapping.

string.name: help_ManageTags_context_menu_info
string.value: Tap on the icon to edit, assign a color to, or delete a tag.

string.name: help_debt_managment
string.value: Associate debts with parties, inspect list of transactions and calculate remaining balance.

string.name: cab_debts_help_text
string.value: This submenu allows to define new debts associated with the selected party, and to manage existing debts: to inspect the transaction history and the remaining balance and to edit, close or delete them.

string.name: form_DebtEdit_label_help_text
string.value: The label allows to select the debt on the form for transactions, in order to mark a transaction as a down payment.

string.name: form_DebtEdit_amount_help_text
string.value: Enter the original amount of the debt. Transactions linked to the debt will decrease or increase the balance. Use the switch to distinguish between debts you owe and debts that are owed to you. If you select a currency other than your home currency, the debt will only be visible in accounts with the same currency.

string.name: form_DebtEdit_date_help_text
string.value: Enter the date when the debt was incurred.

string.name: help_SetupSync_info
string.value: This screen allows you to select the data that you want to sync between the device and the backend. It lists all the accounts on your device that are not yet synced to other backends, and all accounts stored on the backend. Clicking on / will select or unselect an account for synchronization. If you select an account that already exists both locally and remotely, you need to decide if initially the data on your device should override the existing data on the backend, or the other way round.

string.name: menu_parent_category_selection_help_text
string.value: With this option you customize the tap on a category that has child categories: If it is checked, a short tap will select the category; if it is unchecked, a short tap will expand / collapse the category. In the latter case, selection is available from the context menu.

string.name: cab_ManageCategories_select_help_text
string.value: Map the selected category to the transaction and return to the transaction form.

string.name: help_WebUI_info_1
string.value: Call the URL displayed in the subtitle from a web browser on your desktop computer.

string.name: help_WebUI_info_2
string.value: Currently the web user interface does not support transfers or split transactions.

string.name: help_WebUI_info_3
string.value: You can set a password to protect access. In the dialogue presented by the web browser, only password is taken into account, username is ignored.

string.name: help_WebUI_info_4
string.value: When displaying transactions for the selected account, the web user interface will use the same filters that you have set with the app on the Android device.

string.name: cab_MyExpenses_select_help_text
string.value: Multi-selection can be started by selecting this command, or by long tapping on a list entry.

string.name: help_DebtOverview_info
string.value: Click on an entry in order to expand / collapse.

string.name: debt_help_overflow
string.value: For each debt, use the menu in the top right corner in order to edit, close, delete or share it. Foreign currency debts can optionally be listed with equivalent amounts in the home currency.

string.name: menu_show_all_help_text
string.value: Debts that have been closed or paid off (their balance is 0), will only be shown, if this option is checked.

string.name: menu_type_filter_help_text
string.value: When this option is activated, you can select to only show expense, income or transfer categories.

string.name: menu_aggregate_neutral_categories_help_text
string.value: Transactions mapped to income categories are always counted as income, transactions mapped to expense categories are always counted as expense. This option allows you to configure how transactions mapped to neutral categories are counted: By default if they are positive they represent an income, if they are negative an expense. But if this option is activated, they are always included into both the sums of your income and expense.

string.name: cab_MyExpenses_filter_help_text
string.value: Search for transactions with same properties.

string.name: menu_archive_help_text
string.value: After selecting a date range, all transactions for this period will be rolled up into a summary archive transaction. This will clear up the transaction list, but the transactions in the archive can still be inspected, and, if needed, unpacked again.

string.name: menu_ManageBudgets_grouping_help_text
string.value: The budget list can be grouped either by account or by type of budget.

string.name: help_PriceHistory_info
string.value: Foreign currency accounts can be configured to use dynamic exchange rates. For every day you can either download or enter a specific rate relative to your home currency. This screen lists stored rates for a given currency for every day back to the date of the oldest transaction. The source of the rate is indicated as follows:

string.name: cab_PriceHistory_download_help_text
string.value: Download the rate for the given date from the configured provider. Some providers will not provide rates for every date, e.g. for week ends or public holidays, and instead return an earlier rate.

string.name: cab_PriceHistory_add_help_text
string.value: Manually enter the rate for the given date. The user provided rate has priority over downloaded rates.

string.name: dynamic_exchange_rate_help_text_1
string.value: If a foreign currency account is configured to use dynamic exchange rates, you can set a specific equivalent amount for every transaction.

string.name: dynamic_exchange_rate_help_text_2
string.value: The current value of a foreign currency account with dynamic exchange rates is calculated based on the most recent exchange rate.

string.name: dynamic_exchange_rate_help_text_3
string.value: The option %s allows you to track the up-to-date net worth of all your accounts.

string.name: help_user_exchange_rate
string.value: This rate has been provided by the user while editing the equivalent amount of a transaction.

string.name: help_calculated_exchange_rate
string.value: This rate has been calculated automatically from existing rates, when the home currency was reconfigured.

string.name: menu_NavigationDrawer_show_equivalent_value_help_text_intro
string.value: With this option checked, you can see how each foreign currency account contributes to the grand total in your home currency. If an account does not use dynamic exchange rates, its value is calculated based on the rate set in the account’s properties. Otherwise:

string.name: menu_NavigationDrawer_show_equivalent_value_help_text_dynamic_1
string.value: The initial value is based on the rate set in the account’s properties.

string.name: menu_NavigationDrawer_show_equivalent_value_help_text_dynamic_2
string.value: Income and expense sums are calculated using the equivalent amounts specified for each transaction.

string.name: menu_NavigationDrawer_show_equivalent_value_help_text_dynamic_3
string.value: The current value is based on the latest exchange rate for the account’s currency.

string.name: help_PrintLayoutConfiguration_info
string.value: Columns can be resized by dragging the black rectangle between columns. The icons and allow to add new columns. Fields can be dragged, and either dropped to a new position or to the recycle area. If you drop a field onto another field, you create a combined field, i.e. the two fields will be printed together on one line.

string.name: account_types_help_v2
string.value:
Account types classify accounts as
        \n\u2022 Assets (something you own, such as cash, bank accounts, or investments) or as
        \n\u2022 Liabilities (something you owe, such as credit cards or loans).
        \nYou can add custom types and set their order, which mainly affects how they appear on the balance sheet.

string.name: account_flags_help_v2
string.value:
Flags let you configure an account’s visibility and priority:
        \n\u2022 Hide rarely used accounts, while still choosing whether invisible accounts are included in aggregate accounts and the balance sheet.
        \n\u2022 Prioritize favorite accounts in the account selection on the transaction form.
        \nYou can also use flags to indicate accounts belonging to a specific purpose, like household versus personal accounts, and then alternatively only show one or the other.

string.name: menu_balance_sheet_help_text
string.value: The balance sheet shows the net worth of all your accounts as the difference between your Assets (what you own) and your Liabilities (what you owe). It reflects your financial position at a chosen moment — whether in the past, the present, or even in the future. The balance sheet presentation is also influenced by flags (which can change the inclusion of accounts in totals).

string.name: cab_flag_help_text
string.value: Assign a flag to the selected account, e.g. Favorite or Inactive.

string.name: form_payer_or_payee_help_text
string.value:
This field allows you to select or create a Payer/Payee. Begin typing the name, and suggestions will appear. If no suggestion is selected, a new party is created. If a suggestion is selected, it is displayed as a chip.
Modify the details of the selected party.
Remove the current selection. The text field will then reappear.

string.name: help_RoadmapVoteActivity_info
string.value: Please help us define the future development roadmap! This screen lists all the open tickets from Github . Distribute 10 points (50 if you own a professional licence key) among those tickets that are most important for you. Tap on an issue to learn more about it and to spend weight on it. Once you have finished, do not forget to submit your vote. Thank you for your participation!

string.name: menu_RoadmapVoteActivity_search_help_text
string.value: Only tickets which match your query will be displayed.

string.name: menu_RoadmapVoteActivity_vote_help_text
string.value: Once you have distributed all your points, this button will allow to submit your vote.

string.name: menu_RoadmapVoteActivity_refresh_help_text
string.value: The list of issues is cached locally. Fetch list again from the Internet.

string.name: menu_RoadmapVoteActivity_clear_help_text
string.value: All weights will be reset to 0.

string.name: cab_RoadmapVoteActivity_learn_more_help_text
string.value: Learn more about the ticket by reading its page on Github.

string.name: cab_RoadmapVoteActivity_set_weight_help_text
string.value: Select the amount of points that corresponds to how relevant the issue is for you.
